projects.name: Kazakhstan mining development and ore logistics watch
projects.opportunity_signal: Track mine expansion, crushing, hauling, loading, unloading and railway/port links.
projects.feasibility_gate: Requires official owner, license, reserve, transport route and capex evidence.
search_queries: site:gov.kz Kazakhstan mining development investment program
site:invest.gov.kz Kazakhstan mining metallurgy project
Kazakhstan mine expansion ore logistics railway port EPC

projects.name: Kazakhstan metallurgy and smelter modernization watch
projects.opportunity_signal: Monitor furnace, raw-material handling, environmental retrofit and steel plant equipment demand.
projects.feasibility_gate: Requires official investment plan, plant owner confirmation and technical scope.
search_queries: site:gov.kz Kazakhstan metallurgy plant modernization
site:invest.gov.kz Kazakhstan smelter steel plant investment
Kazakhstan furnace raw material handling environmental retrofit

projects.name: Kazakhstan thermal power and coal handling watch
projects.opportunity_signal: Watch generation capacity, coal mine feedstock, wagon tippler, stacker and conveyor packages.
projects.feasibility_gate: Requires government energy plan, fuel supply route, EPC model and emissions constraints.
search_queries: site:gov.kz Kazakhstan thermal power plant construction
site:primeminister.kz Kazakhstan power plant modernization
Kazakhstan coal handling wagon tippler stacker conveyor power plant

projects.name: Caspian Sea port construction and bulk cargo handling watch
projects.opportunity_signal: Track Aktau/Kuryk quay, storage yard, lifting, transport and ore loading projects.
projects.feasibility_gate: Requires port authority source, financing plan, cargo forecast and sanction/compliance check.
search_queries: site:gov.kz Aktau port development Kazakhstan
site:gov.kz Kuryk port infrastructure Kazakhstan
Kazakhstan Caspian port bulk cargo ore loading equipment

projects.name: Kazakhstan oil refining and petrochemical modernization watch
projects.opportunity_signal: Monitor refinery upgrade, utilities, storage, loading and environmental equipment packages.
projects.feasibility_gate: Requires owner announcement, tender evidence, sanctions screen and payment route review.
search_queries: site:gov.kz Kazakhstan oil refinery modernization
site:invest.gov.kz Kazakhstan petrochemical project
Kazakhstan refinery storage loading utilities environmental equipment

projects.name: Kazakhstan government infrastructure plan watch
projects.opportunity_signal: Screen five-year and ten-year national, regional and logistics plans for EPC, railway, port, energy and industrial park packages.
projects.feasibility_gate: Requires official plan text, budget source, procurement route, responsible agency and approval stage.
search_queries: site:gov.kz Kazakhstan national infrastructure plan 2030
site:primeminister.kz Kazakhstan infrastructure development plan
Kazakhstan five year ten year plan railway energy port industrial park

projects.name: Kazakhstan agriculture machinery, drone and fertilizer watch
projects.opportunity_signal: Track agricultural machinery, agricultural drones, organic fertilizer, liquid fertilizer and plant/animal growth additive demand.
projects.feasibility_gate: Requires local registration rules, buyer type, import rules, product compliance and channel evidence.
search_queries: site:gov.kz Kazakhstan agricultural machinery subsidy
Kazakhstan agricultural drones fertilizer import demand
Kazakhstan organic fertilizer liquid fertilizer plant growth regulator

work_buddy_collection_matrix.scope: government plans, procurement notices, investment agencies, port and energy authorities
Alashankou, Horgos, Jeminay, Yili Prefecture ports, southern Xinjiang ports, HS code and freight signals
mining, metallurgy, thermal power, Caspian ports, oil refining, agriculture machinery and fertilizer
internal brief, feasibility draft, video/script draft and social media draft

skill_assessment_items: Search expansion quality across Chinese, English, Russian and Kazakhstan/Qazaqstan naming variants
Official-source recognition for government, customs, procurement, port, energy and investment agencies
Feasibility report structure: owner, scope, evidence, economics, logistics, compliance, risks and approval gate
Customs-data discipline: HS code, port, period, quantity, value, grade, origin/destination and source URL
Risk boundary discipline: sanctions, export control, customs conclusion, quotation, payment, contract and public publishing
